G

GameController - Class in com.bifasico.soduko.controller
Controller for game-view.fxml.
GameController() - Constructor for class com.bifasico.soduko.controller.GameController
 
GameView - Class in com.bifasico.soduko.view
Responsible for all JavaFX node creation, styling, and updates for the board grid and digit toolbar.
GameView(GridPane, HBox, Button[]) - Constructor for class com.bifasico.soduko.view.GameView
 
GameView.CellState - Enum Class in com.bifasico.soduko.view
Visual states a cell can be rendered in.
GameView.TriConsumer<A,B,C> - Interface in com.bifasico.soduko.view
Functional interface for three-argument event lambdas.
generate(Board) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.BoardGenerator
Fills every cell in the given board with a valid Sudoku solution and then marks exactly Board.GIVEN_CELLS_PER_REGION cells per region as given.
getBoard() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.BoardManager
Returns the current board (root of the tree).
getCell(int) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Region
Returns the cell at the given index within this region (0-5).
getCellAt(int, int) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Board
Finds and returns the cell at the given absolute grid coordinates by traversing the board tree.
getCellAt(int, int) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Region
Returns the cell at the given absolute grid coordinates, if it belongs to this region.
getCells() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Region
Returns the list of all 6 cells in this region.
getColumn() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Cell
Returns the absolute column index of this cell within the 6x6 grid.
getDisplayValue() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Cell
Returns the effective display value of this cell.
getGuess() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Cell
Returns the value guessed by the player for this cell.
getIndex() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Region
Returns the index of this region within the board (0-5).
getInstance() - Static method in class com.bifasico.soduko.view.SceneManager
 
getRegion(int) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Board
Returns the region at the specified index.
getRegionFor(int, int) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Board
Returns the region that owns the cell at the given absolute coordinates.
getRegions() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Board
Returns all 6 regions (children) of this board.
getRow() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Cell
Returns the absolute row index of this cell within the 6x6 grid.
getSelectedDigit() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.view.GameView
Returns the currently selected digit from the toolbar (-1 if none).
getStartColumn() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Region
Returns the absolute column index where this region starts in the 6×6 grid.
getStartRow() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Region
Returns the absolute row index where this region starts in the 6×6 grid.
getValue() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Cell
Returns the definitive solution value of this cell.
GIVEN_CELLS_PER_REGION - Static variable in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Board
 
GRID_SIZE - Static variable in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Board
